_human_review.notes: Project owner instructed Codex to mark the US Stage B generated/reconciled tests as approved for internal/project benchmarking after manual review on 2026-06-05. This is not legal advice, external counsel review, or procurement-grade legal approval; candidate labels remain separate from locked recall baselines.

_label_note: AUTO-LABELED by LLM. Spot-check before refreshing recall.lock.json. Lock updates must include this provenance in --reason per item 16.
_label_tier_note: US Stage B cleanup: must_detect is the strict detector-aligned benchmark tier; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-labeled statutory coverage for gap discovery. ideal_must_detect is not a locked recall baseline. Stage B labels are project-owner approved for internal benchmarking.

_strict_reconciliation.basis: US Stage B auto-label strict tier was reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine findings; original auto-label breadth is preserved in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. This is internal benchmark cleanup, not legal advice or procurement-grade review.
_strict_reconciliation.strict_source: PreSendReviewEngine.review(..., review_profile='strict') after narrowed SA/US Stage B detector precision fixes

ideal_must_detect.matched_text: Term Sheet — Proposed acquisition of Aurelius CareNet Systems LLC (“Seller”) by NewHarbor HealthBank, Inc. (“Buyer”), a Delaware corporation and U.S. issuer, to combine healthcare payments and community banking platforms.

Structure & Financing: reverse subsidiary merger; proceeds funded by a senior secured term loan under a commitment from BlueMesa Capital Partners LP (fictional), subject to U.S. bank regulatory approvals and satisfaction of internal credit policies.

Closing Conditions: HSR filing if required, HIPAA/GLBA/CCPA compliance review, absence of a Material Adverse Change; for the avoidance of doubt, a MAC shall not be deemed to occur due to general DEI policy updates, sponsorships of local sports teams, or adoption of religion‑neutral holiday calendars.

Employee Matters: Mr. Owen R. Vale (Employee ID: NH‑HB‑3 7 4‑XX2), designated transition lead, will receive a retention bonus; per Schedule 5.2(a), his hospital biometric timeclock template (finger‑vein scan) will be deleted at closing and his Crohn’s treatment schedule may be shared only with the occupational health nurse under HIPAA.

Data Carve‑Outs: Ms. Priya L. Menon (email: pmenon@aur‑carenet.example), a patient‑analyst liaison, has a documented BRCA1 genetic carrier status and is a member of the North Downtown Health care Workers Uni on; such data shall not transfer and must be pseudonymized or deleted prior to closing.
